hyperedges.label: AI Provider Swap via Environment Variable
Web Search Fallback Chain (Tavily → GoogleGrounding)
Dual Database Pattern (Public Metrics + Private Data)
Hexagonal Ports: AI, Search, Storage, Transcriber abstractions
Luma AI Response Pipeline: prompt building, history, AI call, tool dispatch
Message Routing Chain: Router → Queue → Handler → Plugin dispatch
Plugin Dispatch Pattern: PluginManager routes commands to all registered plugins
Metric Tracking Pattern: Plugins increment DatabaseService metrics after actions
Dashboard Status Flow: QrCodePresenter stdout signals consumed by Dashboard via WebSocket
Web Search Fallback Chain: Tavily → Google Grounding
AI Adapter Contract Suite (GeminiAdapter + OpenAIAdapter implement AIPort)
Port Contract Test Coverage (all ports tested in one suite)
Message Processing Pipeline: Router → Adapter → Handler → Plugins
DI Wiring: Bootstrap creates Container registering all ports
AI Provider Selection: Factory picks Gemini/OpenAI/DeepSeek by env config

links.source_location: comment: dispatch é responsabilidade do PluginManager
dispatch routes commands to plugin owners; CommandRouter.test comment confirms PluginManager handles dispatch
getText() returns history text consumed by buildPromptRequest historyText param
both are pure decision/state-management infra modules without side effects
Logger.error called with jid on task failure
JidQueue used to enqueue per-JID processing
LUMA_CONFIG.TRIGGERS used for message trigger detection
both use LUMA_CONFIG.TRIGGERS to guard against double-processing same message
SpontaneousHandler.handle called for group messages without trigger
